lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: Hey, down there! What is it?

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: For the dragons, of course! I've always wanted to slay dragons. I've found they're a bit tough, though, even with all this kit I've got, but I'll slay them one day.

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: My little cousin is a Slayer Master, lucky girl. But one day I'll be a mighty dragon-slayer, and they'll give me a job like that too.

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: My little brother became a Slayer Master recently. That job should have been mine - he's just a little brat! But one day I'll be a mighty dragon-slayer, and they'll give me a job like that too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I kill the dragons in here?

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: Yes, certainly, since you've been assigned to do so.

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: No, you haven't got an assignment to slay these dragons. Go and train somewhere else.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Hieve
lines.text: I'm sure that's not what you're meant to be slaying.
